name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.RightHandParentOffset
summary: Pointing-from offset from parent effector, expressed in spine3's frame, x = back/forward, y = right/left, z = up/down. This is added to the measured one if useIncomingTransforms=true and measureParentOffset=true.  NB NOT used if rightHandParentEffector LT 0.  Pistol(0,0,0) Rifle(0.0032, 0.0, -0.0).
